summary: Completed comprehensive testing of jarnnmarket Farmers Auction Platform Phase 2 features. Backend APIs show 88.5% success rate with all major Phase 2 features working. Frontend successfully displays Phase 2 features including phone verification status, escrow sections, and PayPal integration components.

flaky_endpoints.issue: PayPal Buy Now failed due to auction becoming inactive during testing
flaky_endpoints.workaround: Test with fresh auction or create new auction for PayPal testing

integration_issues.issue: Some auction cards don't navigate to detail page on click
integration_issues.workaround: Use 'Bid Now' button to access auction detail page

passed_tests: Login with demo farmer credentials (john@farm.com / password123) - user has phone_verified=true
Login with demo buyer credentials (buyer@demo.com / password123) - user has phone_verified=true
Dashboard shows phone verification status (Phone Verified)
Dashboard shows escrow section with Pending Delivery count
API GET /api/ shows feature flags: sms_verification=mock, paypal=mock, escrow=enabled
API POST /api/auth/phone/send-code returns mock OTP code successfully
API POST /api/auth/phone/verify verifies phone with correct mock code
API GET /api/users/me/escrows returns user escrow transactions
Auctions page shows Buy Now badges on eligible auctions
Won auctions section shows payment status and escrow information
Phone verification modal opens and displays mock code
Payment method selection shows both Stripe and PayPal options
All 23/26 backend API endpoints working (88.5% success rate)
Phase 2 SMS verification (MOCK mode) working correctly
Phase 2 Feature flags properly configured and accessible
action_item_for_main_agent: Minor issues: 1) Fix auction card click navigation to detail pages, 2) Ensure PayPal Buy Now works with active auctions. Both are low priority as workarounds exist and core functionality works.

success_percentage.frontend: 90% (Phase 2 UI features visible, minor navigation issue)
